requirement_topic.en: EMC and Harmonics — 60 Hz Bahamas Grid, IEEE / UL Direction, and Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和谐波——60 Hz巴哈马电网、IEEE / UL方向及项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和諧波——60 Hz巴哈馬電網、IEEE / UL方向及項目證據

summary.en: For Bahamas PV projects, EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared for a 60 Hz, 120/240 V grid and for the interconnection documentation expected by BPL, the project engineer, and the authority having jurisdiction. IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 style inverter evidence may be requested because The Bahamas uses a US-heritage NEMA ecosystem. IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence can still be useful as technical support, but exporters should not assume a 50 Hz China GB/T 37408 EMC package or European EN 50549/VDE grid package is sufficient without 60 Hz project review.
summary.zh: 巴哈马光伏项目的EMC和电能质量证据应按60 Hz、120/240 V电网，以及BPL、项目工程师和主管机构预期的并网文件准备。由于巴哈马使用美式NEMA生态，可能要求IEEE 1547和UL 1741式逆变器证据。IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC证据仍可作为技术支持，但出口商不得假定50 Hz中国GB/T 37408 EMC文件包或欧洲EN 50549/VDE并网文件包在未经60 Hz项目审查时已足够。
summary.zht: 巴哈馬光伏項目的EMC和電能品質證據應按60 Hz、120/240 V電網，以及BPL、項目工程師和主管機構預期的併網文件準備。由於巴哈馬使用美式NEMA生態，可能要求IEEE 1547和UL 1741式逆變器證據。IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC證據仍可作為技術支持，但出口商不得假定50 Hz中國GB/T 37408 EMC文件包或歐洲EN 50549/VDE併網文件包在未經60 Hz項目審查時已足夠。

standards_or_laws: IEEE 1547 — distributed energy resource interconnection and interoperability, including power-quality and response functions
UL 1741 — inverter and interconnection-system equipment certification direction that may be requested for US-heritage 60 Hz systems
IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (supporting evidence where accepted)
IEC 61000 series — EMC and harmonic test methods and limits, subject to project acceptance

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC files commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and CNAS laboratory reports generated under China domestic voltage and frequency assumptions. These reports may document emissions, immunity, and harmonics for a China 220/380 V, 50 Hz configuration. They do not automatically prove operation or power-quality compliance on a Bahamas 120/240 V, 60 Hz circuit or under IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 project expectations.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC文件通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及在中国国内电压和频率假设下出具的CNAS实验室报告。这些报告可记录中国220/380 V、50 Hz配置下的发射、抗扰度和谐波情况，但不能自动证明在巴哈马120/240 V、60 Hz回路上运行或符合IEEE 1547 / UL 1741项目期望下的电能质量要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC文件通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及在中國國內電壓和頻率假設下出具的CNAS實驗室報告。這些報告可記錄中國220/380 V、50 Hz配置下的發射、抗擾度和諧波情況，但不能自動證明在巴哈馬120/240 V、60 Hz迴路上運行或符合IEEE 1547 / UL 1741項目期望下的電能品質要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), including EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited China domestic EMC and power-quality test reports

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence should be screened against the Bahamas installation configuration. Exporters should identify whether the inverter will be supplied as split-phase 120/240 V, three-phase 60 Hz, or through transformer-coupled architecture; confirm harmonic and conducted/radiated EMC evidence under the relevant 60 Hz operating mode; and obtain IEEE 1547 / UL 1741 or IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 supplemental reports where the project reviewer requires them. Re-testing may be needed if existing EMC reports are limited to 50 Hz China grid conditions or a materially different wiring configuration.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC证据应按巴哈马安装配置筛查。出口商应识别逆变器将以分相120/240 V、三相60 Hz或经变压器耦合架构供货；确认相关60 Hz运行模式下的谐波及传导/辐射EMC证据；并在项目审查方要求时取得IEEE 1547 / UL 1741或IEC 62920 / IEC 61000补充报告。若现有EMC报告仅限于中国50 Hz电网条件或显著不同的接线配置，可能需要重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408 EMC證據應按巴哈馬安裝配置篩查。出口商應識別逆變器將以分相120/240 V、三相60 Hz或經變壓器耦合架構供貨；確認相關60 Hz運行模式下的諧波及傳導/輻射EMC證據；並在項目審查方要求時取得IEEE 1547 / UL 1741或IEC 62920 / IEC 61000補充報告。若現有EMC報告僅限於中國50 Hz電網條件或顯著不同的接線配置，可能需要重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required in practice for BPL/project-owner technical acceptance, especially where IEEE 1547, UL 1741, harmonics, or EMC reports are specified in procurement or interconnection documents
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC reports may support domestic voluntary certification but do not automatically satisfy Bahamas 60 Hz project evidence requirements

source.publisher: Bahamas Bureau of Standards and Quality (BBSQ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat a China 50 Hz GB/T 37408 EMC package as complete Bahamas evidence. Map the supplied inverter configuration to the Bahamas 120/240 V, 60 Hz installation and confirm whether the reviewer expects IEEE 1547 / UL 1741, IEC 62920, IEC 61000-series harmonics, or other EMC reports before project submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国50 Hz GB/T 37408 EMC文件包视为完整的巴哈马证据。应将供应的逆变器配置映射到巴哈马120/240 V、60 Hz安装，并在项目提交前确认审查方是否要求IEEE 1547 / UL 1741、IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列谐波或其他EMC报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國50 Hz GB/T 37408 EMC文件包視為完整的巴哈馬證據。應將供應的逆變器配置映射到巴哈馬120/240 V、60 Hz安裝，並在項目提交前確認審查方是否要求IEEE 1547 / UL 1741、IEC 62920、IEC 61000系列諧波或其他EMC報告。
